data.name: Horny Princess Survivors
data.detailed_description:
Horny Princess Survivors is an adult-only Survivor-like game where you step into the heels of daring princesses on a quest to rescue their Prince Charmings. Choose your favourite princess and dive into fast-paced combat against relentless waves of monsters. After each successful mission, upgrade your princess’s skills and witness her unique stress-relief methods.

CHOOSE YOUR PRINCESS

Each princess comes with distinct abilities and traits, offering a unique play-style for every run. Unlock exclusive, steamy scenes as you guide your chosen princess through her journey to save the princes!

THE HOTTEST BULLET HEAVEN

Combine skills and upgrades to transform your princess into an unstoppable force. Mow down hordes of enemies sent by the Evil Witch and carve your path to victory.

UPGRADE YOUR GEAR

After every run, spend your hard-earned coins to enhance your gear, boosting your chances of surviving the increasingly challenging waves in your next attempt.

data.short_description: The Prince Charmings are in peril! In Horny Princess Survivors, you’ll step into the heels of bold princesses on a mission to save the day. Slash through hordes of enemies across the Magical Land and storm the Evil Witch's castle in this very very sexy Survivor-like game.
